description_long: This is an above-ground, octagonal jacuzzi with a wooden exterior frame and a bright blue interior basin. The jacuzzi features a set of wooden steps on one side for easy entry and a metal ladder on the opposite side for additional access. A visible filtration or pump system, colored orange and black, is attached externally, indicating water circulation and maintenance functionality. The structure is reinforced with vertical wooden slats and horizontal beams, giving it a sturdy, rustic appearance suitable for outdoor urban environments. The interior is smooth and spacious, designed to comfortably accommodate multiple users. No visible jets or control panels are present, and the jacuzzi appears to be empty of water.
description: An octagonal, above-ground wooden jacuzzi with blue interior, external steps, a metal ladder, and an attached orange pump system. The structure is robust and designed for outdoor use, with no visible water inside.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the wooden steps, blue interior, and attached orange pump system on the right.
description_view_1: Direct end view highlighting the metal ladder and the pump system, with the steps not visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the jacuzzi, the blue interior, and the pump system on the left.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the wooden steps and blue interior, with the pump system not visible.
